headline: Super vs Folk — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Folk for people choosing a personal AI agent. Folk is positioned within the broader automation landscape, while Super focuses on agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper. Includes market context across ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, and Orchids, with sources on why computer-use agents matter now.
